content.en:
Ye Tian didn't know much about the Nirvana Dao Ancestor, as for whether he was convinced or not, he didn't care, after all, the Nirvana Dao Ancestor was no longer the Ten Kings now, no matter how powerful he was, he couldn't lead others.

The position of the Ten Kings of Black Wind Mountain is very special, at the level of the Supreme Dao Ancestor, the Ten Kings are respected, if the Nirvana Dao Ancestor leads other Supreme Dao Ancestors or even the Ten Kings, then the rules will be chaotic.

Nirvana Daozu once served as the Ten Kings, so he knows the rules, and it is estimated that he will not have any opinions.

With the passage of time, the medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm, which had already stabilized, was completely formed, and the fluctuations of spatial rules were also stable, and at this time, entering the Forbidden Void Realm had no effect.

Crash!!!

A Famous Dao Ancestor shuttled into this medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm, and Ye Tian also led the Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain into the Forbidden Void Realm.

Upon entering, everyone was placed in an environment similar to that of the Forbidden Continent.

Endless mountain ranges, forbidden rivers across continents, forbidden forests covering areas of the Forbidden Forest......

"It turned out to be a medium-sized forbidden void realm of the forbidden continent type, such a forbidden void realm is resource-intensive, and its value is much greater than that of the starry sky type forbidden void realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"Collect resources on your own first, and then converge later. If any force dares to take the lead in refining this forbidden void realm, they will immediately converge and stop it, understand?"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes, Dark King!"

Many supreme Dao ancestors responded to the Dao.

Wow!

One of the strongest Dao Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain left, and soon disappeared.

There are not many Supreme Dao Ancestors who have entered here, but the divine consciousness of the Supreme Dao Ancestors covers too wide, so the speed of searching for forbidden strange objects and forbidden treasures is also very fast, and those Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors can only rely on luck.

If there is no Supreme Dao Ancestor to fight their attention, then they can obtain some forbidden strange things, but if there is a Supreme Dao Ancestor to beat their attention, I am afraid that even the Supreme Dao Ancestor in his own power will not have time to rescue.

After all, the gap between the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor and the Supreme Dao Ancestor was too big, and some powerful Supreme Dao Ancestors could almost instantaneously Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

Ye Tian's divine sense covered the surrounding area, locking the location of the forbidden strange objects one by one.

For the strongest Dao Ancestors, unless it is a forbidden treasure, even if the general forbidden strange thing contains great terror, it will not be able to cause him any harm.

And now, Ye Tian has gradually understood why some forbidden strange things and forbidden treasures contain great horrors.

It is rumored that the Forbidden Treasure and the Forbidden Arcana are projections of some supreme forbidden thing, which has a corresponding forbidden thing in the dark forbidden realm, and those forbidden things are guarded by forbidden creatures.

And seizing the forbidden strange objects and forbidden treasures will attract the attention of such forbidden creatures, and a trace of power will descend through the forbidden origin across the endless dark forbidden realm, so as to exert it on those who touch the forbidden strange objects, thus creating great horrors.

Of course.

Some forbidden strange things will not cause great horror without the harvest of forbidden creatures, so they can be easily taken away.

And the connection between the Forbidden Treasure and such supreme forbidden things is very deep, so the power of the projection of the forbidden creature is also stronger, so the great horror caused by it is also very terrifying!

Of course.

With Ye Tian's strength, even if it is a tough guy's great terrifying power of the forbidden treasure, it will not fall, but it will just be injured.

With the passage of time, one by one the forbidden strange things fell into Ye Tian's hands, and the number was far greater than before.

However, these forbidden and strange things did not completely belong to Ye Tian.

After all, this time, the half-step domain ancestors themselves did not come in, and they restrained the invincible Dao ancestors from coming in, so naturally they would not allow all the forbidden strange things here to belong to their Supreme Dao Ancestors, so before they came in, these Supreme Dao Ancestors also agreed to dedicate half of the forbidden strange objects and forbidden treasures to the forces.

That's fair, otherwise no one will get any benefit.

Ye Tian didn't care, even if he gave half of the forbidden strange things to Black Wind Mountain, he would be able to obtain a large number of forbidden strange things, and with his strength, he was enough to run rampant in the strongest Dao Ancestor, if there was an invincible Dao Ancestor involved, he probably wouldn't be able to grab any forbidden strange things.

Therefore, he did not lose at all.

Soon, he discovered a Forbidden Arcana, and it turned out to be a medium Forbidden Arcana.

......

"Hahaha, medium forbidden treasure, this time it is time for my Lin'an Daozu to get this great opportunity!"

Lin'an Daozu said excitedly.

This is a forbidden treasure similar to the bead type, and it should be a forbidden treasure of the auxiliary cultivation class, which is more suitable for him.

However, a black giant beast shadow appeared on this forbidden treasure, which obviously contained great terror, and if it was touched, it would directly cause great terror.

So, he immediately captured a forbidden bloodline creature from here, and forcibly caused them to cause great horror.

Bang!!!!

One after another forbidden bloodline creatures were shocked to death by the power of the Great Terror, and finally the Great Terror completely dissipated.

But just as he was about to take away this bead forbidden treasure, the void froze, and he couldn't take away this bead at once.

"Who?"

Lin'an Daozu was furious.

But the movement of his hand was not slow, and he grabbed it at once, trying to take away the bead-type forbidden treasure first, and then trouble the enemy.

However, a forbidden spear pierced and contained terrifying power.

Lin'an Daozu's expression changed drastically, and he turned to dodge this forbidden spear.

But it was precisely because of dodging this forbidden spear that the best opportunity to collect this bead was lost.

In the next moment, a figure appeared in front of the bead.

This person is Ye Tian.

"Black Wind Mountain, Dark King, what do you mean by that?"

Lin'an Daozu was furious.

"Lin'an Daozu, I want this bead!" Ye Tian declared domineeringly.

"Dark King, you're just the new Supreme Dao Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain, don't be too arrogant!"

Lin'an Daozu said coldly.

Many people have speculation about the identity of the Dark King, some people think that it is the previous Nine Extremes Heavenly King, and some people think that it is not.

However, no matter who the Dark King is, it is definitely not long after entering the Supreme Dao Ancestor.

And who is he? He is the Lin'an Dao Ancestor, the top existence among the Scattered Cultivation Supreme Dao Ancestors, even compared to the Wind King before the Black Wind Mountain, it is not much weaker, and a new Supreme Dao Ancestor dares to threaten him?

Besides, the Forbidden Spear just now, he didn't feel how powerful it was.

"Not leaving?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Don't go!" Lin'an Daozu said coldly: "I won't leave unless you go away and let me take this forbidden supreme orb." Otherwise, I will teach you a lesson today, so that people know what it means to be truly strong!"

"I can't help but kill more Supreme Dao Ancestors during this period, but if you are looking for death, then die!"

Ye Tian once again condensed a forbidden spear, but the power was much, much stronger than before.

The previous Forbidden Spear was just an ordinary Forbidden Spear, but this time it was blessed with the Forbidden Talent: Dark Spear, and it blessed Ye Tian's own Endless Forbidden Dao, and its power was different from before.

When this forbidden spear came, Lin'an Daozu finally changed color.
